creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like a number of the libm regression tests currently fail on arm64.

From my devkit:
$ cd /usr/tests/lib/msun
$ kyua test
...
$ kyua report
===> Skipped tests
fenv_test:masking  ->  skipped: CPU does not support trapping on floating point exceptions.  [0.003s]
===> Failed tests
exponential_test:generic  ->  failed: 2 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
fma_test:infinities  ->  failed: 20 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.004s]
fma_test:zeroes  ->  failed: 9 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
invtrig_test:special  ->  failed: 4 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
invtrig_test:tiny  ->  failed: 2 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
logarithm_test:generic_tests  ->  failed: 8 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
logarithm_test:log1p_accuracy_tests  ->  failed: 2 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
lrint_test:lrint  ->  failed: 8 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
nearbyint_test:nearbyint  ->  failed: 32 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.004s]
next_test:boundaries  ->  failed: 2 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
next_test:overflow  ->  failed: 2 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
next_test:zeros  ->  failed: 8 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
rem_test:rem3  ->  failed: 2 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
trig_test:special  ->  failed: 6 checks failed; see output for more details  [0.003s]
===> Summary
